query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] **Stewardship Quality Review:**
- #3668 — Good: lesson with clear root cause and takeaway for tick stall pattern
- #3669 — Deprecated: corrected by #3672
- #3671 — Good: pattern for `rand::rng()` API rename in 0.9
- #3672 — Good: lesson covering async context placement + correct rand API

Now spawning the architect for Phase 2.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_deprecate(Superseded by #3672 — corrected to use rand::rng() (not rand::thread_rng()) for rand 0.9.2) → Deprecated #3669 | embedded_ids HashSet and rand::thread_rng must be built in async context, not inside rayon closure]
[Assistant] #3669 and #3672 are duplicates — #3669 is the stale original (with incorrect `rand::thread_rng()` reference), #3672 is the corrected version. Deprecating #3669.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_get(421-bugfix-leader) → #3672 | embedded_ids HashSet and rand::thread_rng must be built in async context, not inside rayon closure | lesson-learned | []]
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_get(421-bugfix-leader) → #3669 | embedded_ids HashSet and rand::thread_rng must be built in async context, not inside rayon closure | lesson-learned | []]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: rand::thread_rng() does not exist in rand 0.9 — use rand::rng()
embedded_ids HashSet and rand::rng() must be built in async context, not inside rayon closure
ADR-002 col-022: Force-Set Semantic for Explicit cycle_start Attribution
Tick source-candidate selection with stable ordering stalls after first window is exhausted
ADR-003: Contradiction Scan as Single Rayon Task; Pool Floor Raised to 4
